meaning: 加利利(巴勒斯坦北部一多山地区) ;n.(中古英国教堂)西端入口处的门廊(或小教堂)
examples: He left Judaea, and departed again into Galilee.
Who says the Messiah is supposed to come from Galilee?
They answered and said unto him, Art thou also of Galilee?
Until recently the Galilee basin coal was unknown to consumers and its quality untested.
His twin daughters, Yuval and Inbal, were on a field trip to Upper Galilee.
